seoTitle: How to Cancel Your n8n Subscription
metaDescription: A general guide to canceling a paid n8n subscription from your account or billing settings so charges stop going forward.
intro: If you're ready to stop paying for an n8n Cloud plan, canceling is handled through your account's billing settings rather than the workflow canvas. This guide keeps things general, walking through where to look for cancellation options and what to check before you confirm.

steps.heading: Open your account settings
steps.body: Log into your n8n account and navigate to your profile or workspace settings.

steps.heading: Find the billing or subscription section
steps.body: Look for the area where your current plan and payment details are managed.

steps.heading: Review your plan details
steps.body: Check your renewal date and any workflows or data that might be affected by downgrading.

steps.heading: Cancel the subscription
steps.body: Follow the cancellation option provided in your billing settings to stop future charges.

steps.heading: Confirm the cancellation
steps.body: Look for a confirmation message or email verifying your subscription has been canceled.

faq.question: Where do I cancel my n8n subscription?
faq.answer: Subscription management is typically found in your account's billing or plan settings.

faq.question: Will I lose my workflows if I cancel my n8n subscription?
faq.answer: This depends on your plan and whether you're self-hosting or on n8n Cloud, so review the specific terms before canceling.

faq.question: Can I switch to a free plan instead of fully canceling?
faq.answer: Depending on what's offered, downgrading to a lower tier may be an alternative to full cancellation.

faq.question: Will canceling stop future charges immediately?
faq.answer: Cancellation typically stops future billing, though you may retain access until the end of your current billing period.
